headline: Is PepsiCo (PEP) Still Attractive After Recent Share Price Strength?
summary: If you are wondering whether PepsiCo at around US$157.67 is priced for opportunity or already reflects its strengths, the answer depends on how you look at value. The stock has returned 1.1% over the last week, 5.1% over the last month, 10.9% year to date, 15.7% over 1 year, 28.4% over 5 years, with a 6.0% decline over 3 years that may affect how you think about risk and reward. Recent attention on consumer brands and shifting preferences between beverages and snacks has kept companies like...

headline: Want $580 in Passive Income? Invest $5,000 Into These 3 Dividend Aristocrats
summary: Earned income has limits. Passive income from dividends operates differently: the money arrives whether you are at your desk or not, whether markets are calm or chaotic, and whether the economy is expanding or contracting. In an environment where cost-of-living pressures continue to squeeze household budgets, the appeal of income that compounds quietly in the ... Want $580 in Passive Income?
